name: LEHMAN ABS CORP GOLDMAN SACHS CAP 1 SEC BACKED SER 2004-6
summary: Lehman ABS Corporation serves as the Depositor for the Corporate Backed Trust Certificates, Goldman Sachs Capital I Securities-Backed Series 2004-6 Trust. The Trust issues publicly offered Certificates representing investors' interests, listed on the NYSE. Certificates are registered in the name of Cede & Co., nominee of The Depository Trust Company. The Trust makes distributions to certificateholders, documented via Form 8-K filings with the SEC.
